title: Convergence Discipline
objective: Allow branches to merge without erasing route history or introducing contradictions.
storyQuestions: Which convergence points currently forget meaningful prior play?
Which shared nodes assume facts not guaranteed on all incoming paths?
Can shared pressure replace shared text where the merge is too blunt?
baseAcceptanceChecks: Merged nodes do not reference unavailable events.
The touched convergence retains route texture through conditionals, callbacks, or altered access.
